title: Colombia EPS Claims & Authorization Bottleneck
problem: Colombia's health system has multiple EPS (Entidades Promotoras de Salud) insurance entities competing for public contracts. Each EPS has different IT systems, authorization processes, and claims submission requirements. Providers must navigate 10+ different EPS portals manually. Prior authorization takes 3-5 days on average. Claims rejection rates exceed 20% due to paperwork errors.
solution: Unified platform integrating all Colombian EPS systems. Single interface for prior authorization, claims submission, and payment tracking. Automated form validation to reduce rejections. Real-time authorization for standard procedures. Provider dashboard showing all EPS relationships.
technology: API integration with EPS systems, automated form validation, prior authorization workflows, claims management
target_customer: Hospitals, clinics, independent physicians, diagnostic centers
regulatory_notes: Colombian health data regulations, integration with Ministerio de Salud standards
varden_fit: HIGH FIT - Similar to Mexico verification problem but with different payer structure. EPS model is unique to Colombia but infrastructure need is identical. Boring admin software with recurring revenue.
notes: BOREALING: Claims processing is the most boring software ever. But it's essential infrastructure. Colombia's EPS model is actually well-suited for a clearinghouse play.
